positive: Minimalist line art illustration of a celestial forest at dawn. The main subject is a cluster of stylized bioluminescent flora and fauna (e.g., crescent moon mushrooms, delicate hummingbirds, gentle deer silhouettes) rendered in deep indigo and gold ink against a slightly lighter twilight background. The style should be clean, high-contrast vector art with strong black outlines and negative space composition. Focus on geometric and organic forms, creating a repeating, pattern-like symmetry suitable for screen printing on apparel. The lighting is dramatic and ethereal, emphasizing sharp edges and deep shadows. --ar 1:1
